level_signals: Trusted thought partner to a GM of a billion-dollar advertising business
Comp range $203K–$214K CAD, consistent with senior individual contributor

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of experience in consulting, corporate tech, or advertising/media, with meaningful exposure to executive audiences.
Strong grounding in digital advertising, retail media, or adjacent businesses—enough to engage credibly on the substance, not just the process.
High EQ and a track record of building trusted advisor relationships with senior leaders; known for being the person who can say the hard thing and still move the room forward.
Exceptional analytical ability—comfortable taking complex, ambiguous challenges and turning them into structured, actionable plans.
Demonstrated project management chops: managing multiple high-stakes workstreams simultaneously, under tight deadlines, without dropping balls.
Outstanding written and verbal communication skills—able to produce crisp executive-ready materials and represent the GM's voice with fidelity.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in high-growth, technology-driven companies where ambiguity is the norm and the playbook is still being written.
Comfort building structured processes from scratch to deliver on complex, cross-functional objectives at scale.
Direct experience partnering with Finance on budget management and annual business planning.

explicitly_excluded: Only hiring in the following Canadian provinces: Ontario, Alberta, British Columbia, and Nova Scotia — US candidates not eligible per posting

scope.surface: Advertising business — retail media platform across Instacart Marketplace, off-platform partnerships, and in-store touchpoints
scope.business_model: B2B retail media / advertising platform (billion-dollar scale)
primary_metrics_inferred: Operating rhythm efficiency (meeting cadence, leadership alignment)
Budget accuracy and defensibility heading into annual planning
core_responsibilities: Design and execute the Ads organization's operating rhythm (team meetings, leadership cadences, organizational communications)
Prepare crisp briefings, talking points, and research for major meetings and external partners
Track deliverables across priority initiatives, surface blockers, and maintain stakeholder alignment
Maintain budget visibility across workforce and non-workforce spend in partnership with Finance
Serve as strategic thought partner and trusted advisor to the GM of Advertising

compensation.equity_form: new hire equity grant and annual refresh grants

green_flags: Equity grant included (new hire + annual refresh)
Clear articulation of what success looks like after 12 months
Flex First remote policy explicitly stated
Role has well-defined scope tied to a billion-dollar business
red_flags: Only open to candidates in four Canadian provinces (Ontario, Alberta, British Columbia, Nova Scotia) — very narrow geography for a remote role
No US hiring for this role, which may limit applicant pool significantly
Compensation stated in CAD only; USD equivalent not provided

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years of experience, scope, and comp range)
seniority.manages_people (inferred; no direct reports mentioned in JD)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly in JD)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred from explicit Canadian-provinces-only hiring statement)
ambiguities: JD is tagged #LI-Remote and describes a Flex First policy globally, but the body explicitly states hiring is only in Ontario, Alberta, British Columbia, and Nova Scotia (Canada). This makes it 'remote' but Canada-only — classified as remote-global with the caveat captured in explicitly_excluded.
work_auth and visa_sponsorship not addressed in the JD body.
